overview.description: The JPMorgan Active Bond ETF (JBND) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, investing in a diverse portfolio of U.S. dollar-denominated, investment grade bonds JBND was launched on Oct 11, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Launches New Fixed Income ETF: JBND
data.text: NEW YORK , October 12, 2023  /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the launch of a new actively managed fixed income ETF, JPMorgan Active Bond ETF (JBND), on the NYSE Arca.
